design_philosophy: Sophisticated, cinematic, intimate, and emotionally precise. A world-class artist archive avoiding generic clichés. Heavy reliance on negative space, deep contrasts, and premium editorial typography to elevate the photography and moving-image work.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-tight
scale.caption: text-sm font-sans text-[#a3a19a]

buttons.primary: border border-[#C19B54] text-[#C19B54] hover:bg-[#C19B54] hover:text-black transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-sm
buttons.secondary: border border-[#8B1C1C] text-[#8B1C1C] hover:bg-[#8B1C1C] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-sm
buttons.ghost: text-[#fdfcf9] hover:text-[#C19B54] transition-colors duration-300 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-sm underline-offset-8 hover:underline

inputs.editorial_form: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-[#2a2a29] pb-4 pt-2 text-[#fdfcf9] placeholder:text-[#a3a19a] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#C19B54] transition-colors rounded-none text-lg

cards.project: group relative flex flex-col gap-4 overflow-hidden bg-transparent
cards.image_hover: object-cover w-full h-full transition-transform duration-700 ease-out group-hover:scale-105 opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 mix-blend-luminosity group-hover:mix-blend-normal

navigation.desktop: hidden lg:flex items-center gap-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.15em] font-sans text-[#fdfcf9]/70 hover:text-[#fdfcf9] transition-colors
navigation.mobile_drawer: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[#0a0a09]/95 backdrop-blur-xl flex flex-col justify-center px-8 gap-8
navigation.header_behavior: fixed top-0 w-full z-40 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#0a0a09]/80 to-transparent backdrop-blur-sm border-b border-white/5 py-6

hero.alt: Cinematic black and white close-up moody portrait

split_still.alt: Grayscale photo of trees covered with fog

split_moving.alt: Cinematic woman face in the dark

1_hero.layout: min-h-screen relative flex flex-col justify-end pb-32 pt-48 container_padding
1_hero.visuals: Full bleed absolute image with bg-[#0a0a09]/50 gradient overlay. Content sits above.
1_hero.content: Title 'KOBI ISRAEL' (h1). Subtitle 'Still & Moving Diaries' (h3 italic). Positioning line (body). 2 Buttons: View Selected Works (ghost) / Collector Inquiries (primary gold).

2_conceptual_entry.layout: py-32 flex justify-center items-center text-center container_padding
2_conceptual_entry.content: Narrow max-w-3xl. Title 'A Chaos of Appearances'. Poetic text block in body size, high line-height, text-[#fdfcf9]/90.

3_selected_works_grid.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-8
3_selected_works_grid.cards: 7 cards (Cuba Love Story, River of Three Crossings, Fragments of Life, Intimate Strangers, Views, Parisian Postcards, Investigating Things Past). Plain blocks bg-[#1a1a19] for images as placeholders if no explicit image provided. Under image: Title (h4), Year/Medium (caption), Description (body text-sm line-clamp-2), 'Enter Project' ghost button.

4_split_still_moving.content: Left: Still, Right: Moving. Each side is relative group, large image background with heavy hover scale effect. Overlay text centered: Media Type (h2), description, 'Explore' ghost button.

5_featured_project.layout: py-32 container_padding grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-16 items-center
5_featured_project.content: Col-span-7: Large Image (Cuba Love Story). Col-span-5: Context. H2 'Cuba, Love Story', 3 CTAs (View Series, Read Journal, Collector Print).

6_prints_collector.layout: py-32 container_padding bg-[#121211] border-t border-b border-[#2a2a29]
6_prints_collector.content: Dark gold accents predominant. 'Limited Edition Prints'. Split layout. Image of print/book (media.prints). Text explaining archival quality, sizing, editions. Button (primary gold).

7_books_section.content: Grid of available monographs/catalogues. Similar card style to projects but distinct proportion (aspect-square or aspect-[3/4]).

8_credibility_strip.layout: py-16 border-b border-[#2a2a29] overflow-hidden flex items-center bg-[#0a0a09]
8_credibility_strip.content: Museum-style credibility. Slow-moving marquee or flex-wrap text of Exhibitions, Collections, Awards. Typography: overline tracking-[0.2em] text-[#a3a19a].

9_artist_statement.content: Max-w-4xl. Large stylized quote (h3), followed by concise bio focusing on investigating masculinity, desire, exile. Emphasize emotional precision.

10_current_projects.content: Bento grid or tight horizontal scroll. Cards: New Work, Moving Image, Music/Sound, Writing, Archive Notes. Minimalist, text-forward cards.

11_contact_inquiries.layout: py-32 container_padding grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-24
11_contact_inquiries.content: Left: Inquiry form (Name, Email, Interest Type dropdown - General/Collector/Press, Message). Editorial style inputs. Right: Newsletter signup 'The Archive Notes'. Solid background block with deep red accent borders or text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark cinematic theme. Do NOT use default Tailwind blue/gray/indigo.
Implement Playfair Display for all serif headings via Google Fonts import.
Implement Manrope for sans-serif body text.
Ensure generous negative space; use py-24 to py-48 between major sections.
Hover animations must feel deliberate, slow, and expensive (duration-500 to duration-700).
Forms must use the 'editorial_form' input class style: no borders except bottom, transparent background.
Inject the provided image URLs in their respective sections to ensure an instant premium feel. Ensure placeholders (like project cards) use #1a1a19 if no image is available.
All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid attributes.
